message:
feat(layout): add tree and radial layout algorithms, fix bounds computation

Implement deterministic tidy-tree layout algorithm (layout_diagram_tree)
that produces hierarchical node placement respecting graph direction
(TB/BT/LR/RL). Uses BFS-based tree structure extraction with stable
ordering, subtree span calculation for sibling spacing, and depth-level
centering for clean rank alignment. Handles forest graphs (multiple
roots) by placing disconnected trees side by side.

Implement radial tree layout algorithm (layout_diagram_radial) for
mindmap and radial diagram types. Distributes nodes in concentric rings
around root node(s), using angle-weighted sector allocation based on
subtree leaf counts. Supports multi-root graphs via a virtual depth
offset. Includes collision avoidance through minimum angular span
calculation based on node sizes and ring radii.

Wire Auto layout algorithm to select radial layout for Mindmap diagrams
and default Sugiyama for all others. Wire Tree and Radial algorithm
variants in the layout() dispatcher.

Fix compute_bounds() to include edge path points in the bounding box
calculation, preventing SVG clipping when edges extend beyond node
boundaries (e.g., curved or routed edges).

Optimize Barnes-Hut force-directed repulsion: replace O(n*n) inner loops
with per-cell node index lists (nodes_in_cell) for direct-force
calculations, avoiding redundant cell membership checks.

Add shared helper functions: build_tree_layout_structure(),
normalize_center_positions(), rank_orders_from_key(),
node_boxes_from_centers(), and associated tree traversal utilities.

Add comprehensive tests for tree layout (TB/LR directions, forest
handling), radial layout (determinism, distance from root), and auto
algorithm selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
